title: Custom notifications logo
excerpt: My team get a lot of notifications via automations and I have been asked if it is possible to alter the little logo that appears on the right for notifications from different boards? Obviously it is already set up as a d…

posts.author: TPL (James Lee)
posts.cookedHtml: My team get a lot of notifications via automations and I have been asked if it is possible to alter the little logo that appears on the right for notifications from different boards? Obviously it is already set up as a different logo for mentions, updates, automations, failed automations etc, so it would be great to have this feature.

posts.author: omid_at_rally (Omid Ebrahimi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello James!

Thank you for posting your question about customizing the notification icons for automations, this is a common concern of users of monday and would implore everyone who agrees to upvote this post.

Currently, monday.com does not offer a native feature to customize or modify the notification icons for mentions, updates, automations, or failed automations. These icons are predefined and cannot be changed within the platform.

In the meantime, our team at Rally Essentials could possibly help you explore custom integration or solutions that could address this specific need. We specialize in custom developments and integrations for monday.com, and we’d be glad to discuss this with you in more detail. Feel free to reach out at omid@rallyessentials.com
